who: vendor managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses using Shopify, processing 10-20 invoices/month
offer: For vendor managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses using Shopify processing 10-20 invoices/month, inefficient tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate weekly procurement spend summaries instead of manual tracking and reporting through spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking of procurement spend across multiple systems.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for vendor managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to vendor managers with demo video links
Participate in community forums for sharing tools and advice
try_it: Let users try Email notifications and Customizable report templates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with clear CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Allow CSV import for existing data
